Rythmos® Flex Wearable

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Location tracking
Fall detection
Activity tracking
Rechargeable

Overview

Rythmos® Flex Wearable is a rechargeable, multi-use wearable designed for continuous resident monitoring, safety, and access. It combines real-time location, nurse call, and fall detection.

FUNCTIONS

Provides real-time resident location tracking
Enables one-press nurse call alerts
Supports automatic fall detection
Collects health and activity data

Key Capabilities

Rechargeable
Design

Eliminate
frequent battery replacement

Flexible
Wear Options

Supports
wrist and pendant use

Integrated
Nurse Call

One-press
alert for immediate response

Automatic
Fall Detection

ML-based
monitoring and alerts

Access
Integration

Enables
proximity-based door access

Continuous
Monitoring

Tracks
movement, activity, and engagement

Hardware Specifications

Power: Rechargeable battery (0-100% in ~2 hours)
Battery Life: Up to 3 months (usage dependent)
Water Resistance: Shower-safe design
Wear Options: Wristband or pendant
Interface: Soft press button
Indicators: LED visual indicator
Security: Optional locking band
Maintenance: Hot-swappable wearable

System Topology — Flex Wearable Deployment

Ideal for tracking and monitoring critical assets or individuals throughout the facility. Deploy in accordance with the community's layout to ensure full coverage and reliable alert delivery via the Rythmos® mesh infrastructure.

Installation Guidelines

Setup

- Assign device to resident via platform
- Configure alert and access settings

Charging

- Recharge using standard charging setup
- Full charge in ~2 hours

Wearability

- Choose wrist or pendant configuration
- Ensure proper fit for continuous wear

Maintenance

- Wipe with soft cloth
- Monitor battery status via platform

Care

- Avoid damage to casing or strap
- Use locking band if required

Service

- OTA updates supported
- Managed via Rythmos® platform

intrexis.com
